title: Markdown‑LD parse/emit/validate with deterministic round‑trip
motivation: Extract and round‑trip JSON‑LD from Markdown with stable ordering and optional anchoring.

api.parse: MarkdownLD.parse(markdown_or_path, opts) :: {:ok, [%{doc: map(), location: %{file: binary, line: non_neg_integer}, meta: map()}]} | {:error, term}

acceptance: parse extracts frontmatter and fenced jsonld
